class FenwickTree
  attr_reader :n, :tree

  def initialize(size)
    @n = size
    @tree = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  end

  def update(index, delta)
    while index <= @n
      @tree[index] += delta
      index += index & -index
    end
  end

  def query(index)
    res = 0
    while index > 0
      res += @tree[index]
      index -= index & -index
    end
    res
  end

  def range_query(l, r)
    query(r + 1) - query(l)
  end
end

def solve(nums, queries)
  n = nums.length
  max_depth = 5
  ft = Array.new(max_depth + 1) { FenwickTree.new(n) }

  def compute_depth(x)
    depth = 0
    current = x
    while current != 1
      current = count_set_bits(current)
      depth += 1
      if depth > max_depth
        return max_depth + 1
      end
    end
    depth
  end

  def count_set_bits(x)
    count = 0
    while x > 0
      x &= x - 1
      count += 1
    end
    count
  end

  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    depth = compute_depth(num)
    if depth <= max_depth
      ft[depth].update(i + 1, 1)
    end
  end

  answer = []
  queries.each do |q|
    if q[0] == 1
      l = q[1]
      r = q[2]
      k = q[3]
      count = ft[k].range_query(l, r)

      end
      nums[idx] = val
      new_depth = compute_depth(val)
      if new_depth <= max_depth
        ft[new_depth].update(idx + 1, 1)
      end
    end
  end

  answer
end
